narration: Start with one pointer at the left end and one at the right end.
decision: Add the two numbers and compare the total to the target.

narration: If the sum is too small, move the left pointer right to make the total bigger.
decision: Moving the right pointer would only make the total smaller.
quizPrompt: Which pointer should move when the sum is too small?

narration: Keep squeezing inward until the pair matches the target or the pointers cross.
decision: Every move throws away pairs that can no longer work.
